first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the justifications, strengths, and concerns are substantively the same across both evaluations. The model correctly identifies the same skill gaps (C++, industrial automation, security standards) in both versions, and the slight differences in wording are consistent with normal run-to-run variation. The model does not introduce any new concerns or change its assessment based on the geographic location of the candidate's experience being changed from various global cities to Kenya.
